testcase.classname: computeFineWeight returns positive value for IN direction
testcase.name: computeFineWeight returns positive value for IN direction

testcase.classname: computeFineWeight returns negative value for OUT direction
testcase.name: computeFineWeight returns negative value for OUT direction

testcase.classname: getPurityLabel handles 100% purity without trailing zero
